data.boss_ai_decision:
STATUS: RISKY for result bets due to conflicting PPG/xG (away stronger) versus odds (home favored). O2.5 potential is low (46%). BTTS (63%) and FH O0.5 (71%) potentials are higher.

REASON: Away team PPG (2.0) and xG (1.42) are superior to home (PPG 1.17, xG 1.31), yet home is favorite. First Half Over 0.5 has the highest explicit potential (71%) among all given metrics.

CONCLUSION: First Half Over 0.5
